assignments.value: Coffee importers, private-label coffee brands, cafe chains, specialty coffee distributors

parameters.jsCode:
// AI-powered ICP scoring using Claude
const companies = $input.all().map(i => i.json);

const prompt = `You are an ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) scoring expert for B2B coffee industry outreach.

Our client: Imago Trading Vietnam / ph6 Coffee
- Premium industrial coffee roastery in Da Nang, Vietnam
- PROBAT P60 automated roasting system
- 40-50 MT/month capacity
- USP: 30-40% lower landed costs vs European-roasted coffee
- Target: SME to mid-sized B2B coffee importers, private-label brands, cafe chains
- Geography: Europe, Australia, Asia, Middle East

Score each company 1-100 based on:
- Industry fit (coffee importer/buyer/distributor/cafe chain)
- Size fit (SME to mid-sized)
- Geographic fit (priority: Europe > Australia > Middle East > Asia)
- Likely need for origin-roasted coffee supply
- Purchasing power indicators

Return ONLY a JSON array with objects: {company_name, icp_score, reasoning, priority_tier}
priority_tier: "A" (80-100), "B" (60-79), "C" (40-59), "D" (below 40)

Companies to score:
${JSON.stringify(companies.slice(0, 50), null, 2)}`;

// This would call Claude API - placeholder for the HTTP request node that follows
return [{ json: { prompt, company_count: companies.length, companies } }];
